mapper.sql: select category_id, parent_id, ancestors, category_code, category_name, order_num, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from mom_material_category
mapper.select:
and category_code like concat('%', #{categoryCode}, '%') and category_name like concat('%', #{categoryName}, '%') and status = #{status}
order by parent_id, order_num, category_id
where category_id = #{categoryId}
where category_code = #{categoryCode} and status = '0'
where category_name = #{categoryName} and status = '0'
select count(1) from mom_material_category where category_code = #{categoryCode} and category_id != #{categoryId}
select count(1) from mom_material where category_id in #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_material_category(parent_id, ancestors, category_code, category_name, order_num, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{parentId}, #{ancestors}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_material_category where category_id in #{categoryId}
mapper.sql: select m.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.spec_model, m.unit, m.category_id, c.category_name, m.material_type, m.status, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from mom_material m left join mom_material_category c on m.category_id = c.category_id
mapper.select: where m.status = '0' order by m.material_code
where m.material_id = #{materialId}
where m.material_code = #{materialCode}
select count(1) from mom_material where material_code = #{materialCode} and material_id != #{materialId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_material(material_code, material_name, spec_model, unit, category_id, material_type, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{specModel}, #{unit}, #{categoryId}, #{materialType}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_material where material_id in #{materialId}
mapper.sql: select m.material_id product_id, m.material_code product_code, m.material_name product_name, m.material_id, m.material_code, m.spec_model, m.unit, m.status, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from mom_material m
mapper.select:
and (m.material_type = 'product' or m.category_id in (select category_id from mom_material_category where category_code = 'FG' or category_name = '成品')) and m.material_code like concat('%', #{productCode}, '%') and m.material_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%') and m.status = #{status}
order by m.material_id desc
where (m.material_type = 'product' or m.category_id in (select category_id from mom_material_category where category_code = 'FG' or category_name = '成品')) and m.status = '0' order by m.material_code
where (m.material_type = 'product' or m.category_id in (select category_id from mom_material_category where category_code = 'FG' or category_name = '成品')) and m.material_id = #{productId}
where (m.material_type = 'product' or m.category_id in (select category_id from mom_material_category where category_code = 'FG' or category_name = '成品')) and m.material_code = #{productCode}
select count(1) from mom_product where product_code = #{productCode} and product_id != #{productId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_product(product_code, product_name, material_id, spec_model, unit, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{materialId}, #{specModel}, #{unit}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_product where product_id in #{productId}
mapper.sql: select resource_id, resource_code, resource_name, resource_type, parent_id, workshop, line_code, status, station_note_flag, print_box_flag, print_nameplate_flag, line_type, station_type, skill_require, wip_capacity, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from mom_resource
mapper.select: where status = '0' order by resource_code
where resource_id = #{resourceId}
where resource_code = #{resourceCode}
select count(1) from mom_resource where resource_code = #{resourceCode} and resource_id != #{resourceId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_resource(resource_code, resource_name, resource_type, parent_id, workshop, line_code, status, station_note_flag, print_box_flag, print_nameplate_flag, line_type, station_type, skill_require, wip_capacity, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{resourceCode}, #{resourceName}, #{resourceType}, #{parentId}, #{workshop}, #{lineCode}, #{status}, #{stationNoteFlag}, #{printBoxFlag}, #{printNameplateFlag}, #{lineType}, #{stationType}, #{skillRequire}, #{wipCapacity}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_resource where resource_id in #{resourceId}
mapper.sql: select calendar_id, calendar_date, shift_code, shift_name, start_time, end_time, is_workday, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from mom_shift_calendar
mapper.select: where calendar_id = #{calendarId}
select count(1) from mom_shift_calendar where calendar_date = #{calendarDate} and shift_code = #{shiftCode} and calendar_id != #{calendarId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_shift_calendar(calendar_date, shift_code, shift_name, start_time, end_time, is_workday, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{calendarDate}, #{shiftCode}, #{shiftName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{isWorkday}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_shift_calendar where calendar_id in #{calendarId}
mapper.select: where r.routing_id = #{routingId}
where r.routing_code = #{routingCode}
select count(1) from mom_routing where routing_code = #{routingCode} and routing_id != #{routingId}
select count(1) from mom_routing where product_id = #{productId} and version = #{version} and routing_id != #{routingId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_routing(routing_code, routing_name, product_id, version, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{routingCode}, #{routingName}, #{productId}, #{version}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_routing where routing_id in #{routingId}
mapper.sql: select o.operation_id, o.routing_id, r.routing_code, o.operation_code, o.operation_name, o.operation_seq, o.standard_minutes, o.resource_type, o.resource_id, res.resource_code, res.resource_name, o.status, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark from mom_operation o left join mom_routing r on o.routing_id = r.routing_id left join mom_resource res on o.resource_id = res.resource_id
mapper.select: where o.operation_id = #{operationId}
select count(1) from mom_operation where routing_id = #{routingId} and operation_code = #{operationCode} and operation_id != #{operationId}
select count(1) from mom_operation where routing_id = #{routingId} and operation_seq = #{operationSeq} and operation_id != #{operationId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_operation(routing_id, operation_code, operation_name, operation_seq, standard_minutes, resource_type, resource_id, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{routingId}, #{operationCode}, #{operationName}, #{operationSeq}, #{standardMinutes}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_operation where operation_id in #{operationId}
delete from mom_operation where routing_id in #{routingId}
mapper.sql: select s.step_id, s.operation_id, o.operation_code, s.step_code, s.step_name, s.step_seq, s.standard_minutes, s.is_report_point, s.step_desc, s.operation_type, s.screw_check_count, s.vision_program, s.guide_task_id, s.image_url, s.status, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from mom_work_step s left join mom_operation o on s.operation_id = o.operation_id
mapper.select: where s.step_id = #{stepId}
select count(1) from mom_work_step where operation_id = #{operationId} and step_code = #{stepCode} and step_id != #{stepId}
select count(1) from mom_work_step where operation_id = #{operationId} and step_seq = #{stepSeq} and step_id != #{stepId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_work_step(operation_id, step_code, step_name, step_seq, standard_minutes, is_report_point, step_desc, operation_type, screw_check_count, vision_program, guide_task_id, image_url, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{operationId}, #{stepCode}, #{stepName}, #{stepSeq}, #{standardMinutes}, #{isReportPoint}, #{stepDesc}, #{operationType}, #{screwCheckCount}, #{visionProgram}, #{guideTaskId}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_work_step where step_id in #{stepId}
delete from mom_work_step where operation_id in #{operationId}
